description: J1939 SPN/FMI codes for commercial vehicles (trucks/buses)

codes.name: Accelerator Pedal Position
codes.description: Accelerator pedal position sensor voltage above normal

codes.name: Accelerator Pedal Position
codes.description: Accelerator pedal position sensor voltage below normal

codes.name: Fuel Delivery Pressure
codes.description: Fuel delivery pressure above normal operating range

codes.name: Fuel Delivery Pressure
codes.description: Fuel delivery pressure below normal operating range

codes.name: Engine Oil Pressure
codes.description: Engine oil pressure sensor voltage above normal

codes.name: Engine Oil Pressure
codes.description: Engine oil pressure sensor voltage below normal

codes.name: Engine Coolant Temperature
codes.description: Engine coolant temperature above normal operating range

codes.name: Fuel Rail Pressure
codes.description: Common rail fuel pressure above normal (ТНВД overpressure)

codes.name: Fuel Rail Pressure
codes.description: Common rail fuel pressure below normal (ТНВД underpressure / leak)

codes.name: Fuel Rail Pressure
codes.description: Common rail pressure deviation — rail pressure regulator malfunction

codes.name: Battery Voltage
codes.description: Battery voltage above normal

codes.name: Battery Voltage
codes.description: Battery voltage below normal

codes.name: Engine Speed
codes.description: Engine speed above normal operating range (overspeed)

codes.name: SCR System (AdBlue)
codes.description: SCR catalyst efficiency below threshold — DEF quality or dosing issue

codes.name: DPF Differential Pressure
codes.description: DPF soot load above threshold — regeneration required

codes.name: DPF Differential Pressure
codes.description: DPF pressure too high — clogged filter, forced regen needed

codes.name: EGR Valve Position
codes.description: EGR valve stuck open or position sensor deviation

codes.name: EGR Valve Position
codes.description: EGR valve mechanical failure — not responding

codes.name: Intake Manifold Temperature
codes.description: Intake manifold temperature above normal (turbo/intercooler issue)

codes.name: Boost Pressure
codes.description: Boost pressure above normal (turbo overboost)

codes.name: Boost Pressure
codes.description: Boost pressure below normal (turbo underboost / leak)

codes.name: Torque Limitation
codes.description: Engine torque derate active — emissions system fault

codes.name: DEF (AdBlue) Dosing
codes.description: AdBlue dosing valve performance — incorrect dosing quantity

codes.name: NOx Sensor
codes.description: NOx level above threshold — SCR efficiency problem

codes.name: Engine Oil Temperature
codes.description: Engine oil temperature above normal operating range

codes.name: Fuel Temperature
codes.description: Fuel temperature above normal — affects injection calibration

codes.name: VGT/VNT Turbo Actuator
codes.description: Variable geometry turbo actuator abnormal update rate

codes.name: J1939 CAN Bus
codes.description: J1939 data link erratic — CAN communication error

fmi_definitions.0: Data valid but above normal operating range (most severe)
fmi_definitions.1: Data valid but below normal operating range (most severe)
fmi_definitions.3: Voltage above normal or shorted to high source
fmi_definitions.4: Voltage below normal or shorted to low source
fmi_definitions.5: Current below normal or open circuit
fmi_definitions.6: Current above normal or grounded circuit
fmi_definitions.7: Mechanical system not responding or out of adjustment
fmi_definitions.8: Abnormal frequency or pulse width or period
fmi_definitions.15: Data valid but above normal operating range (least severe)
fmi_definitions.16: Data valid but above normal operating range (moderate severity)
fmi_definitions.17: Data valid but below normal operating range (least severe)
fmi_definitions.18: Data valid but below normal operating range (moderate severity)
